name: James M.
title: Saved our weekend move
review: Mohamed and his team moved us from a second-floor apartment in Iowa City to our new home in Coralville. They showed up right on time, wrapped everything carefully, and didn't waste a minute. After a bad experience with a big national chain a few years back, this was a breath of fresh air. Fair price too.

name: Sarah T.
title: Reliable freight hauling when it mattered
review: We needed a pallet of auto parts moved from Cedar Rapids to Chicago on short notice. Freight Bridge got it there in two days without any damage. Mohamed kept me updated the whole time. I run a small shop and can't afford delays — these guys delivered. Will use again for sure.

name: David K.
title: Good communication, solid work
review: Used Freight Bridge to move a few large pieces of furniture from Des Moines to Minneapolis. Pricing was straightforward and they were easy to communicate with. The delivery window was a bit wider than I would have liked, but everything arrived in great shape. Would recommend for anyone needing freight service.

name: Amanda R.
title: Mohamed made our cross-state move painless
review: Moving from Chicago to Iowa City felt overwhelming until we found Freight Bridge. Mohamed walked us through the whole process and his crew handled our stuff like it was their own. Not a single scratch on anything. They even helped us rearrange furniture after unloading. Worth every penny.

name: Tom L.
title: Office move done over a weekend
review: We moved our dental practice from Coralville to a new space in Iowa City. Freight Bridge came in Saturday morning and we were seeing patients by Monday. They disassembled and reassembled our equipment without any issues. Mohamed is a pro — he spotted a few potential problems with the new layout before we even started.

name: Jennifer P.
title: Solid freight service to Iowa
review: Shipped a load of restaurant equipment from Minneapolis to a buyer in Des Moines. Pickup and delivery were both on schedule. The only hiccup was a small mix-up on the delivery time window, but they called ahead and sorted it out. Equipment arrived undamaged and the price was better than the other quotes I got.

name: Mike B.
title: Three moves, three great experiences
review: I've hired Freight Bridge three times now — once for a couch delivery from a local shop, then for a full house move, and most recently to haul some building materials. Every time they've been on time, careful, and fair with pricing. It's rare to find this level of consistency from a small outfit. Highly recommend.

name: Rachel H.
title: Affordable long-distance move
review: Mohamed moved my daughter's things from Iowa City to Chicago for her first job out of college. As a parent, I was worried about stuff getting lost or broken, but he was incredibly thorough with inventory and packing. The final bill was exactly what he quoted — no surprise fees. We'll call him again when she moves next.

name: Chris W.
title: Good value for freight hauling
review: Needed to move industrial shelving units from Des Moines to Cedar Rapids. Freight Bridge handled the loading and strapping down properly. The crew was professional and got it done faster than I expected. Only giving four stars because one shelf had a minor scuff — but honestly that might have been there before.

name: Lisa M.
title: Cared for our stuff like it was theirs
review: I was nervous about moving my antique dining set across town. Mohamed took the time to wrap each piece individually and explained exactly how they'd secure it in the truck. Delivery was smooth and they placed everything exactly where I wanted it. Kind, professional, and reasonably priced. This is the moving company Iowa City deserves.
